Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.parser

package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.parser
  • Class
    Description
    JsonParser
    A complete JSON parser implemented using Parser Combinators.
    JsonValue
    A purely functional JSON AST with built-in optics.
    JsonValue.JsonArray
     
    JsonValue.JsonBoolean
     
    JsonValue.JsonNull
     
    JsonValue.JsonNumber
     
    JsonValue.JsonObject
     
    JsonValue.JsonString
     
    ParseError
    Represents a failure in parsing.
    Parser<A>
    A functional parser that transforms a State into an Either a ParseError or a successful value with a new State.
    State
    Immutable state tracking the parsing position.
